zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann ferch Llywelyn於1105年出生時，她的父親Llywelyn ap Iorwerth46歲，母親Ellyw verch Elidir5歲。她於1149年與Einion ap Llywarch在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1164年在英國威爾斯享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann ferch Llywelyn于1105年出生时，她的父亲Llywelyn ap Iorwerth46岁，母亲Ellyw verch Elidir5岁。她于1149年与Einion ap Llywarch在威尔士卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1164年在英国威尔斯享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ann ferch Llywelyn was born in 1105, her father, Llywelyn ap Iorwerth, was 46 and her mother, Ellyw verch Elidir, was 5. She married Einion ap Llywarch in 1149, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died in 1164, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann ferch Llywelyn est née en 1105, son père, Llywelyn ap Iorwerth, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Ellyw verch Elidir, avait 5 ans. Elle a épousé Einion ap Llywarch en 1149, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée en 1164, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann ferch Llywelyn 1105 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llywelyn ap Iorwerth 46 und ihre Mutter Ellyw verch Elidir 5. Sie hat 1149 in Carmarthenshire, Wales Einion ap Llywarch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb 1164 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann ferch Llywelynが1105年に生まれた時，父Llywelyn ap Iorwerthは46歳，母Ellyw verch Elidirは5歳であった。1149年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでEinion ap Llywarchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1164年にイギリスウェールズで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann ferch Llywelyn(이)가 1105년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llywelyn ap Iorwerth(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellyw verch Elidir(은)는 5세였다. 그녀는 1149년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Einion ap Llywarch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1164년 영국 웨일스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann ferch Llywelyn nasceu em 1105, seu pai, Llywelyn ap Iorwerth, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Ellyw verch Elidir, tinha 5 anos. Ela casou-se com Einion ap Llywarch em 1149, em Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1164, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann ferch Llywelyn родилась в 1105 г., её отцу по имени Llywelyn ap Iorwerth было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellyw verch Elidir, 5. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Einion ap Llywarch в 1149 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла в 1164 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann ferch Llywelyn nació en 1105, su papá, Llywelyn ap Iorwerth, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Ellyw verch Elidir, tenía 5 años. Se casó con Einion ap Llywarch en 1149, en Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1164, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
